title: Summary: Turn 797
content: The `knowledge-base` project (D:\workspace\KnowledgeBase\knowledgeBase) is a Java 8 Maven engine that extracts concepts from multimedia via LLM OCR/ASR and fallback, infers relations (e.g., DEPENDS_ON) using OpenAI API, and visualizes a knowledge graph with Cytoscape.js + React/Vite; it runs as CLI demo, web API, or full-stack app with H2/JSON storage.
